description: PlayBack State is a ProtoFlux node that provides information of a (IPlayable). This can be used to get information of if the a source is playing, the current time position, and the length of the audio source.

fields.Source: The IPlayable to provide information from.
fields.IsPlaying: Tells if the source is playing.
fields.Loop: Tells if the source is set to loop.
fields.Position: The playing position of the current target in seconds as a float.
fields.NormalizedPosition:
The playing position of the current target remapped to a float minimum of 0 and maximum of 1. 
This essentially remaps the song length to 0 being the start and 1 being the end.
fields.ClipLength: The target length in seconds, as a float.
fields.Speed: The target current playing speed. 1 is equivalent to x1.0.
